title: stachys turneri
intro: Stachys turneri, also known as 'Honeywort', is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stachys turneri include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and reduce fever. Stachys turneri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
